title: hymenophyllum plumieri
intro: Hymenophyllum plumieri is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the plumieri's scale fern. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum plumieri include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to the skin in the form of creams and ointments.
